_doc: Speaker deadlines for the edition. Each becomes a dated task on every active speaker / Master Class speaker, created by SpeakerDeadlineSeeder. The reminder job then sends reminders for them automatically (14/7/3/1 days before due). daysBeforeEvent is counted back from the event start date (ELDK27 = 2027-02-09).

deadlines.title: Update your speaker profile information on Event Hub
deadlines.description: Travel, hotel, speaker dinner, polo, jacket, gift, country, gender, accreditation, first-time-speaker flag -- all the speaker-side fields under Speaker / Travel / Hotel / Dinner / Swag / Lunch must be filled in.

deadlines.title: First PPT draft due
deadlines.description: Upload your first presentation draft to the ELDK27 Presentations folder, then send a confirmation email to info@expertslive.dk.

deadlines.title: Final presentation upload
deadlines.description: Upload the FINAL presentation to the ELDK27 Presentations folder so attendees can check out the slides.
